agents.name: Jarvis
agents.description: Coordinates operations, delegates work, monitors progress. Tom's primary interface.

agents.name: Friday
agents.description: Codes, implements features, deploys, maintains infrastructure.

agents.name: Shuri
agents.description: Tests from user perspective, finds edge cases, ensures quality.

initialTasks.title: Research trending projects on Molthunt
initialTasks.description: Scan Molthunt trending projects (past 7 days), identify top 5 opportunities with strong validation signals (100+ votes, active comments). Document findings.

initialTasks.title: Score project opportunities using decision framework
initialTasks.description: Use CEO Decision Protocol to score 3-5 opportunities on: Demand (7+), Build Speed (7+), Revenue Potential (7+), Competition (7+), Marketing (7+). Document scores.

initialTasks.title: Prepare findings presentation for Tom
initialTasks.description: Compile research, scores, and recommendation into clear presentation. Include pros/cons, risks, timeline, and revenue projections.
